note: Largest UPI merchant base outside India; UPI expanded to Abu Dhabi in 2024; Al Maya & LuLu stores nationwide
World's first real-time bilateral P2P link (UPI-PayNow); HitPay live for tourists from Mar 2025; PayNow corridor expanded to 19 Indian banks (Jul 2025)
First country to adopt UPI outside India (Jul 13, 2021); accepted at shops, hotels & tourist sites via BHIM app
200,000+ POS terminals at 60,000+ merchants; RBI-NRB agreement Feb 2024 for UPI-NPI P2P remittance corridor
First European nation; debuted Feb 2, 2024 at Eiffel Tower; now live at Galeries Lafayette, Paris cafés & e-commerce via Lyra
Launched Feb 12, 2024 alongside Mauritius; 450,000+ LankaQR touchpoints; PhonePe-LankaPay tie-up live May 2024; airport & tourist zones covered
Launched Feb 12, 2024; RuPay card also accepted via MauCAS network; bilateral flows enable Mauritians to pay in India too
QNB-NIPL deal Jul 2024; went live Sep 2025 at Qatar Duty Free (Hamad Airport); 8th country live; full rollout across QNB-acquired merchants underway
MoU signed Jun 2025 during PM Modi's visit; 2nd European nation; EU gateway positioning; merchant rollout pending
MoU signed Oct 7, 2025; NTT DATA operates CAFIS—Japan's largest card payment network; first East Asian UPI entry; 208,000+ Indian tourists in Jan-Aug 2025 (+36% YoY)
NIPL-PayNet MoU Feb 12, 2026 linking UPI with DuitNow QR; Phase 1: Indians pay at 29 lakh DuitNow touchpoints; Phase 2: Malaysians pay at UPI QR in India; Merchantrade live for remittances since 2021
UPI-PromptPay interoperability advancing via BIS Project Nexus (India, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines founding members; target live 2026); PromptPay has 81M+ registrations
MoU signed Aug 2024 during EAM Jaishankar visit; President Muizzu formed consortium (Oct 2024) led by TradeNet; RuPay live at Bank of Maldives ATMs/POS from Oct 2024
NPCI-Eurobank Ergasias MoU Feb 29, 2024; focused on cross-border payments and diaspora remittances
Agreement signed Feb 2026 during PM Modi's state visit; enables UPI-based cross-border transactions for tourists & businesses
MoU signed 2023; NRI mobile number UPI access enabled; large Indian diaspora (~780K); live merchant rollout still pending
PPRO MoU Nov 2021; UK NRI mobile numbers UPI-enabled from Apr 2023; merchant acceptance limited; deeper integration discussions ongoing
NIPL-BCRP agreement Jun 5, 2024; first South American country to adopt UPI tech stack; building UPI-like domestic RTP system; launch expected 2025-26
NIPL-Bank of Namibia deal May 2, 2024; building UPI-like instant payment infrastructure for domestic P2P and P2M transactions
BIS Project Nexus founding member (Jun 2024); UPI-InstaPay cross-border linkage targeted for 2026; strong remittance corridor with India
GCC-wide initiative via Buna (Arab Monetary Fund); large Indian diaspora (~2.5M); NRI mobile number UPI access enabled; formal merchant rollout TBD
NRI mobile number UPI access enabled from Apr 2023; no merchant QR acceptance yet; under NIPL expansion discussions
NRI mobile number UPI access enabled from Apr 2023; no merchant QR acceptance yet; large Indian diaspora driving demand
NIPL-MDT collaboration announced Sep 27, 2024; building UPI-like domestic RTP infrastructure for P2P and P2M payments
